ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight, used by the U.S. Census Bureau to create weighted counts */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the highest level of education completed by the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education completed */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship of the individual within the household */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the individual */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Annual salary of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health status of the individual */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the individual's household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES census_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES census_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES census_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES census_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES census_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES census_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES census_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES census_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the code (e.g., workclass, education, marital_status, etc.) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the code (e.g., STEM, Humanities for education) */,
  "code_value" TEXT /* Value of the code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the data access (e.g., research, policy-making) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
